metadata.description: Epistemic-discipline skills for Claude Code — how an agent knows things before, during, and after work. Composes with the superpowers workflow skills.

plugins.name: using-epistemic-skills
plugins.description: Start here: the router. Which discipline applies to a task, in what order, and how each one's output feeds the next. Install this plus whichever skills you want.

plugins.name: applying-formal-rigor
plugins.description: Graduate-level formal-theory floor for design and complexity decisions: name the precise construct, derive the conclusion (incl. recurrences, Master Theorem, lower bounds), sweep every relevant lens.

plugins.name: blindspot-pass
plugins.description: Pre-dispatch epistemic reconnaissance: surface the unknown-unknowns before committing effort, then rewrite the request to aim at the real target.

plugins.name: gauntlet
plugins.description: Adversarial-review staple: multi-lens panel review of a frozen subject with falsifier discipline, mechanical evidence verification, and a computed GO/CONDITIONAL/NO-GO verdict.

plugins.name: evidence-research
plugins.description: Scholarly evidence with two independent engines: Consensus discovers what the literature says, Scite interrogates how each finding was received — supporting/contrasting citations and retractions.

plugins.name: evidence-locked-uat
plugins.description: UAT where no agent certifies its own work: separated actor / blinded verifier / deterministic judge, evidence packets, and a verdict vocabulary that cannot round INCONCLUSIVE up to PASS.
